text:
* wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> [2013-03-11]:
> 1.11.1 released !

How typical. Actually, it happens very often with Piwik. Anyway, this
is better than modifying already released versions (which they also
have done several times).

This PR can be closed - I have just submitted a new PR for Piwik 1.11.1.
(I don't have the PR number yet.)

Regards,
Hans
